[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000010 2
1 11111011 7
2 01100101 4
3 11111111 a
4 01000101 3
5 01011010 4
6 11111011 7
7 01100101 4

01 10 00001010 2
12 21 00011111 5
23 32 10111001 5
34 43 10011110 5
45 54 11001101 5
56 65 10110000 3
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 01001111 5

02 20 00010101 3
13 31 10100110 4
24 42 00100111 4
35 53 01010011 4
46 64 01111101 6
57 75 10110000 3
60 06 01001111 5
71 17 01000101 3 match 4

03 30 10101100 4
14 41 00111000 3
25 52 11101010 5
36 63 11100011 5
47 74 01111101 6
50 05 11111111 a match 3
61 16 01000101 3 match 4
72 27 01011010 4 match 5

04 40 00110010 3
15 51 11110101 6
26 62 01011010 4 match 5
37 73 11100011 5
[completion]
